---
title: <!-- title of the lesson starting with with "Lesson x.x" -->
subtitle: <!-- Unit x, Lesson x -->
format: html
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Quick Links

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Examples | Lecture Notes | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](../practice/practice1_1.qmd) | [рҹҢұ](../primer/primerx_x.qmd) | [рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ«](../lecture_slides/lecture_slides1_1.qmd) | [рҹ““](link) | [рҹ“Ӣ](link) | [вһЎпёҸ](lesson1_2.qmd) |


## Before Class

| Practice | Primer | Previous Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](link) | [рҹҢұ](link) | [в¬…пёҸ](link) |

## After Class

| Practice | Primer | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](../practice/practice1_1.qmd) | [рҹҢұ](../primer/primer1_1.qmd) | [вһЎпёҸ](lesson1_2.qmd) |

:::

# Outcomes

<!-- List outcomes for this lesson in the form of:

Topic

- Outcome 1
- Outcome 2
- Outcome 3
- etc.

-->

# Preparation

<!-- Add preparation materials, prerequisites, and resources here -->
<!-- This includes reading links and homework downloads -->



# Lecture

<!-- Main lecture content goes here -->
<!-- This includes slides, notebooks, and instructor notes -->

# Activity

<!-- Activity instructions, code, visualizations, and downloads -->

# Before next class

<!-- Instructions, including any prep work, finishing class work, project work, or a practice homework -->

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](link) | [рҹҢұ](link) | [рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ«](link) | [вһЎпёҸ](link) |
</template>



<example>
---
title: "Unit 1.2: Call and LLM"
format: html
---

# Outcomes

APIs & Your First LLM Call

- Define what an API is, broadly and practically
- Make an API call to an LLM вҖ” seamless environment setup
- Be aware of common challenges when working with APIs

# Preparation

None today (first day of class!)

# Links

| Powerpoint | Example | Primer | Practice | Lecture Notes |
|------------|---------|--------|----------|---------------|
| [:teacher:](lecture_slides/slide1_1.pptx) | [:notebook:](examples/example1_1.qmd) | [:seedling:](primers/primer1_1.qmd) | [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](practice/practice1_1.qmd) | :clipboard:(instructor_notes/notes1_1.qmd)

<!-- More stuff -->



# Before next class

<!-- Instructions, including any prep work, finishing class work, project work, or a practice homework -->

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| [рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҖҚвһЎпёҸ](link) | [рҹҢұ](link) | [рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ«](link) | вһЎпёҸ(link) |
